news.summary: CAMAS, Wash.--nLIGHT, Inc. has appointed Mark Hartman to its Board of Directors as a Class III director, with a term expiring in 2027. This leading provider of high-power lasers for critical directed energy and manufacturing applications also named Mr. Hartman to the Audit Committee in place of Doug Carlisle, who resigned. nLIGHT, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq as LASR and continues to enhance its corporate governance with strategic appointments.
news.headline: nLIGHT, Inc. appoints Mark Hartman to Board of Directors as a Class III director with a term until 2027.

news.summary: Yesterday, Landsbankinn held a covered bond auction where holders of the series LBANK CB 25 had the opportunity to participate in a covered bond exchange offering. Participants were able to sell their covered bonds in the series at a predetermined clean price of 98.973 and acquire covered bonds from the auction.
news.headline: Landsbankinn hf. held a covered bond exchange offering, allowing holders of LBANK CB 25 to sell bonds at a price of 98.973.

news.summary: In Houston, SynergenX, a prominent provider in hormone therapy, TRT, weight loss, and wellness services, has introduced their new SynergenX App. This innovative app is accessible for free on both the Apple App Store and Google Play, aiming to empower patients in overseeing their healthcare more conveniently. Through this user-friendly platform, patients can effortlessly schedule and handle appointments. The app provides features such as appointment booking and management, as well as convenient check-in options. This advancement offers patients greater autonomy, ease, and assurance in managing their health, enabling access to care from any location at any time.
news.headline: SynergenX introduces new app for hormone health management, offering convenience to patients. Available on Apple Store, Google Play.

news.summary: London-based EBC Financial Group (UK) Ltd's CEO, David Barrett, is advising international investors to exercise caution amidst increasing macroeconomic uncertainty and growing disparity among asset classes. He suggests reducing leverage, diversifying investments wisely, and bracing for potential uncertainties. In a recent interview on China Central Television (CCTV), Barrett outlined a strategic investment approach for navigating volatile market conditions. The interview, where Barrett was joined by other industry experts, emphasized the importance of stability in investment strategies.
news.headline: EBC CEO urges caution in markets amid uncertainty, advises lower leverage, strategic gold allocation.

news.summary: In Tinton Falls, N.J., Cherry Hill Mortgage Investment Corporation (NYSE: CHMI) has declared a dividend of $0.15 per share for the second quarter of 2025. This dividend will be paid in cash on July 31, 2025, to shareholders of record as of June 30, 2025. The company's Board of Directors has also announced a dividend of $0.5125 per share on the common stock.
news.headline: Cherry Hill Mortgage Investment Corp. to pay $0.15/share on common stock on July 31, 2025. Dividend record date: June 30, 2025.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Pottery Barn, a brand under Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM), the leading digital-first, design-oriented, and eco-conscious home retailer, unveiled a partnership with renowned fashion brand Cynthia Rowley. The collaboration introduces the Cynthia Rowley for Pottery Barn line, melding Rowley's distinctive vibrant and feminine style with Pottery Barn's renowned quality. The collection features a vivid range of decorative items, tabletop pieces, and home décor.
news.headline: Pottery Barn teams up with fashion designer Cynthia Rowley for new home collection, blending her vibrant designs with their craftsmanship.

news.summary: John Hope Bryant, Founder, Chairman, and CEO of Operation HOPE, along with his wife Chaitra Dalton-Bryant, entrepreneur and philanthropist, were honored with the Medal of Valor by the Auschwitz Jewish Center Foundation at their 2025 Annual Gala in New York City. The award acknowledges their efforts in fostering connections between the Black and Jewish communities and addressing hatred. The couple’s dedication to this cause was recognized through this prestigious honor.
news.headline: John Hope Bryant and Chaitra Dalton-Bryant honored with Medal of Valor by Auschwitz Jewish Center Foundation.

news.summary: Gong cha, a popular beverage brand, recently revealed Felix from the world-famous South Korean group Stray Kids as their latest Global Brand Ambassador.
news.headline: Gong cha appoints Stray Kids’ Felix as Global Brand Ambassador.

news.summary: The Department of the Interior has proposed a notable boost in its budget request for fiscal year 2026, focusing heavily on enhancing preparedness and swift response capabilities. The increase in funding is set to significantly augment resources allocated towards proactive measures and quick reaction strategies. This move highlights a strong commitment to fortifying the department's ability to handle emergencies and mitigate potential risks efficiently. The proposed budget signifies a substantial investment towards strengthening the DOI's capacity in these crucial areas, demonstrating a clear dedication to ensuring effective preparedness and response efforts.
news.headline: Bridger Aerospace discusses Executive Order for wildland firefighting, DOI seeks significant increase in fiscal 2026 budget for preparedness and rapid response.

news.summary: StepStone Real Estate (SRE), the real estate branch of StepStone Group (Nasdaq: STEP), was named the Investment Consultancy of the Year at the 2025 IPE Real Estate Global Awards in New York on June 13. This prestigious recognition highlights the exceptional work of SRE in the real estate sector and solidifies its position as a leading player in the industry. As part of StepStone Group, SRE continues to demonstrate its expertise and commitment to delivering outstanding results for investors.
news.headline: StepStone Real Estate wins Investment Consultancy of the Year award for 4th year. Part of StepStone Group.

news.summary: The report "Edition 2025: EV Battery Technologies and Supply Chain Management, 2025-2035" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. Electric vehicles (EVs) are playing a crucial role in the global transition to a more sustainable future, with their batteries being a vital component driving this change. As the demand for EVs continues to soar, significant changes in technology, markets, and competition are expected over the next decade. The report delves into the upcoming developments in EV battery technologies, outlining the direction of progress, key players, and challenges in the industry.
news.headline: Report predicts growth of EV battery industry from 2025-2035 driven by demand for electric vehicles, with China leading; potential tariffs may impact growth.

news.summary: Senators Elizabeth Warren and Richard Blumenthal expressed concerns to Meta Platforms Inc. CEO Mark Zuckerberg about the company's potential stablecoin project. They worry that if large tech companies have their own private currencies, it could harm competition, financial privacy, and give monopolistic platforms control over the U.S. money supply. The senators highlighted risks such as exploitation of consumer data for advertising, manipulation of pricing, and selling private information to third parties. They also raised concerns about money laundering, consumer protection, and national security threats. The senators have asked Zuckerberg for detailed information on Meta's stablecoin plans.
news.headline: Sen. Elizabeth Warren criticizes Mark Zuckerberg's alleged stablecoin plans, labeling it a national security threat. Meta denies any such intentions.
BlackRock acquired 3% of the total Bitcoin supply, exploring its implications.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has reached a record low of 3.8%. This marks a significant decrease of 0.2% from the previous month. The number of new jobs created in the last quarter exceeded expectations, with over 250,000 jobs added to the economy. Additionally, the average hourly wage saw an increase of 3.2%, indicating positive growth in the job market. Experts are optimistic about the future job prospects as the economy continues to show signs of strength and stability.
news.headline: Clippers create top home-court edge in NBA. Know-how works magic.

news.summary: In Houston, Sunnova Energy International Inc. reported receiving approval for strategic transactions to bolster a value-focused sale process during their ongoing Chapter 11 proceedings. The Company, along with some subsidiaries, voluntarily filed for chapter 11 in the United States Bankruptcy Court for the Southern District of Texas. This move signifies a crucial progression in their restructuring journey.
news.headline: Sunnova receives interim court approval for debtor-in-possession financing in Chapter 11 proceedings to support sale process.

news.summary: On June 9, 2025, Singapore-based company JBDI Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: JBDI) successfully passed all proposed resolutions at its Annual General Meeting held at its offices in Singapore. The meeting, held at 34 Gul Crescent, Singapore 629538, saw all resolutions submitted for shareholder approval duly adopted.
news.headline: JBDI Holdings reports successful AGM on June 9, 2025; all proposed resolutions adopted by shareholders.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, SharpLink Gaming, Inc. (Nasdaq: SBET) revealed its acquisition of 176,270.69 ETH for $462,947,816, at an average price of $2,626 per ETH. This move establishes the company as the world's largest publicly-traded ETH holder, second only to the Ethereum Foundation. Alongside a previous transaction on May 26, 2025, SharpLink also raised $79 million through its at-the-market facility. The majority of these funds were utilized to purchase more ETH, resulting in an 11.8% growth in ETH per share since June 2, 2025.
news.headline: SharpLink Gaming acquires 176,271 ETH for $463 million, becoming 2nd largest ETH holder after Ethereum Foundation. Raised $79 million more for ETH purchases. ETH per share growth at 11.8% since June 2.

news.summary: ESGL has received robust support from its shareholders for the business combination with De Tomaso. The closing of the deal is moving forward, subject to review by Nasdaq and completion of final closing conditions. This positive development underscores the confidence of investors in the merger, highlighting the momentum behind the transaction. Key milestones have been met, positioning the companies for a successful integration.
news.headline: ESGL gets shareholder approval for De Tomaso merger; awaiting Nasdaq review for final closing.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, 180 Degree Capital Corp. (NASDAQ: TURN) highlighted the submission of a revised preliminary joint proxy statement/prospectus on Schedule 14A to the SEC, on June 12, 2025, regarding its intended merger with Mount Logan Capital Inc. The merger is an all-stock deal, dubbed the "Business Combination." The surviving entity after the merger is anticipated to be a Delaware corporation named Mount Logan Capital Inc. ("New Mount Logan"), to be listed on Nasdaq under "MLCI." As part of the merger, shareholders of 180 Degree Capital will obtain ownership in New Mount Logan, with the allocation determined by 180 Degree Capital’s net asset value compared to Mount Logan's valuation of about $67.4 million at signing, subject to specific pre-closing modifications.
news.headline: 180 Degree Capital Corp. files amended preliminary proxy for merger with Mount Logan Capital Inc., $67.4M valuation.

news.summary: In recent reports, it has been stated that the unemployment rate has increased to 6.2%, with a total of 10.2 million people currently unemployed. This surge in unemployment is believed to be due to the ongoing economic downturn resulting from the global pandemic. Additionally, it has been reported that the GDP has contracted by 4.3% in the second quarter of this year. These figures highlight the significant challenges faced by the economy and the labor market as they navigate through these uncertain times.
news.headline: June 2025: Letter to Nvni Group Limited shareholders discussing company performance and future plans.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, Indaptus Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: INDP) revealed the successful sale of about $2.3 million worth of convertible promissory notes and warrants. The company, focused on advanced cancer and viral infection therapies, is in the middle of a fundraising effort and aims to collect a total of $5 million. This transaction was orchestrated by a healthcare-centered institutional investor.
news.headline: Indaptus Therapeutics, Inc. sells $2.3 million in private placement of convertible notes and warrants, seeking to raise up to $5 million total.

news.summary: The company has recently acquired more than 100 bitcoins as part of its long-term growth strategy. This move signifies the company's commitment to diversifying its assets and exploring investment opportunities in the cryptocurrency market. This purchase aligns with the company's vision for future financial stability and growth.
news.headline: Bitcoin Depot increases Bitcoin holdings, now holding over 100 BTC for long-term growth strategy amid market momentum.

news.summary: An announcement was made today that Processa Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: PCSA), a company focused on developing Next Generation Cancer (NGC) therapies, will have executive leaders present at the 2025 BIO International Convention in Boston, Massachusetts from June 16-19, 2025. This clinical-stage pharmaceutical company is actively involved in the advancement of innovative cancer treatments. The event serves as a platform for industry experts to engage and collaborate on the latest developments in biotechnology and pharmaceuticals.
news.headline: Processa Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: PCSA) to connect with partners, investors at BIO International Convention 2025 in Boston.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, Grace Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: GRCE) of Princeton, N.J., shared news about their advancements with GTx-104, an innovative injectable form of nimodipine aimed at aiding patients with aneurysmal subarachnoid hemorrhage. The late-stage biopharma company's CEO, Prashant Kohli, is set to take part in the BIO 2025 International Conference in Boston, MA from June 16-19, 2025. This development marks a significant step in addressing the pressing medical needs of aSAH patients.
news.headline: Grace Therapeutics to attend 2025 BIO International Conference, develops GTx-104 for aSAH patients. CEO to participate.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 13, 2025, Tree Island Steel Ltd. (TSX:TSL) revealed that the Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.015 per share. This dividend applies to all outstanding Common Shares and will be distributed on July 15, 2025. Shareholders recorded at the end of business on June 30, 2025, will receive this payout.
news.headline: Tree Island Steel declares quarterly dividend of $0.015 per share, payable July 15 to shareholders of record on June 30.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on June 13, 2025, PHX Energy Services Corp. revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per common share labelled as an “eligible dividend” as per the Income Tax Act (Canada). The dividend is set to be distributed on July 15, 2025, to shareholders of record as of June 30, 2025.
news.headline: PHX Energy declares quarterly dividend of $0.20 per share, payable on July 15, 2025, to shareholders of record by June 30.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, Aligos Therapeutics, Inc. disclosed that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors provided non-qualified stock options for the acquisition of 26,000 shares of the Company's stock to new employees on June 10, 2025. This grant, referred to as the "Inducement Grant," was given as part of their employment initiation. Aligos, a clinical stage biopharmaceutical firm on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ALGS, specializes in enhancing patient outcomes related to liver and viral diseases.
news.headline: Aligos Therapeutics grants 26,000 stock options under Nasdaq rule for new employees, issued on June 10, 2025.
